title: Regime-Conditioned Position Size Scalar (VIX Regime + HMM Integration)
summary: Connect the already-planned HMM Regime Detection backlog item to position sizing: when HMM detects a high-volatility or bear regime, apply an additional 0.5x multiplier to all position sizes. When HMM detects a low-volatility bull regime, allow sizes up to but not exceeding the ATR volatility-target level. This creates a two-layer regime-aware sizing system: ATR handles instrument-level volatility, HMM handles portfolio-level regime risk. Research from PHBS Working Paper (2024) and the MQL5 GARCH system (2026) both confirm this layered approach outperforms single-method sizing.
expected_impact: Volatility-managed portfolios (Moreira & Muir 2017) reduce drawdowns in recessions and improve Sharpe; GARCH-regime system backtested 2015-2025 shows consistent improvement vs buy-and-hold across 8 asset classes; PortRSMs (MDPI 2025) achieves +0.03 Sharpe improvement in US markets
